headline: Tracking Bill Ackman's Pershing Square 13F Portfolio - Q4 2025 Update

headline: Airbnb Taps Uber Executive as New Operations Chief
summary: Just a few weeks after it started testing airport pickups, Airbnb has hired a former Uber executive to lead its global operations.  Now it has appointed 12-year Uber veteran Gus Fuldner as Airbnb’s new head of its operations.  As senior vice president of core services at Uber, Fuldner led teams in safety, support and payments.

headline: Joby Aviation’s eIPP Wins And Uber Launches Put Commercial Path In Focus
summary: Joby Aviation has been selected as a key partner in multiple winning bids under the White House backed eVTOL Integration Pilot Program, clearing the way for early air taxi operations across several U.S. states this year. The program selection gives Joby a platform to showcase its Superpilot autonomous flight technology in real world settings. Joby is also preparing to launch air taxi services with Uber in multiple markets, including first operations in Dubai through the Uber app. For...
